candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; matches net sales figures and is top-line; preferred per candidate list.
Cost line, not revenue; rejected for REVT despite candidate list.
Non-operating financial income, not operating revenue; rejected.
Interest income component of financial income, not sales revenue; rejected.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue; rejected.
Best match for cost of goods sold / cost of sales; direct production costs with matching amounts to Cost of Revenues - Total.
Overhead SG&A, not direct COGS; rejected.
R&D, not COGS; rejected.
Could include production overhead but label is too broad vs explicit COGS line; use explicit COGS instead.
Minor operating cost; not main COGS.
Misc operating costs; not primary COGS given explicit COGS line exists.
Payroll overhead; not pure COGS and overlaps SG&A; rejected.
Legal/provision costs; not COGS.
Working capital adjustment, not COGS line item.
Net operating result, not a cost component; rejected.
Financing costs; not COGS.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Supplemental disclosure, largely SG&A-related; not main COGS line.
Lease-related overhead; not main COGS.
Special items; not recurring COGS.
Special COVID-19 items; not COGS.
Asset, not expense.
Inventory asset; contributes to COGS but not the COGS line itself.
Liability, not COGS line.
Operating income, not expense; excluded for SG&A components.
Explicit SG&A line; primary operating overhead bucket and populated in preview, so per rules use this alone for XSGA_COMPONENTS.
Broader operating/production costs that may mix with COGS; not needed when explicit SG&A exists and is populated.

candidates.row_label: Sales, Marketing, Freight and Other Selling Costs
candidates.why: Selling-related SG&A component, but captured within the aggregated SG&A line already.
Admin overhead, but likely a subcomponent of SG&A; explicit SG&A total preferred.
Mixed production/other costs; less clean SG&A proxy than explicit SG&A line.
Generic operating cost; unclear scope vs SG&A and production costs; not needed with explicit SG&A.
Income, not expense; excluded.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A line is present and populated, so per hierarchy rules only that row is used for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Directly labeled R&D expense; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization within R&D; could be considered part of R&D but is a D&A component; secondary to main R&D expense line.
Balance sheet development asset; not the period expense.
Gross development asset; not expense.
Accumulated amortization; not the current period R&D expense line.
Accumulated cost; not the expense.
Asset; not expense.
Primary interest expense line; best first-priority series for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; a component of interest expense; good secondary choice if main line missing.
Other interest expense components; tertiary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; lower-priority fallback.
Balance sheet asset, not expense; excluded.
Same as above; excluded.
Interest-bearing assets, not expense; excluded.
Debt balance, not expense; excluded.
Liability, not interest expense; excluded.
Total debt balance; not interest expense; excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are returned as a priority list; later processing can select the first non-missing per year.

candidates.why: Share of profit from equity-accounted investees; not equity balance; rejected.

candidates.row_label: Share of Loss from Equity Accounted Investees
candidates.why: P&L share of loss; not equity balance; rejected.
Investment asset; not book equity of the company; rejected.
Component of equity, but XBE should capture total equity, not just one component; better to use Total equity.
There are multiple 'Total Equity' rows; the fully populated owners’ equity appears as 'Total equity' (lowercase). Prefer that instead.
Represents total shareholders' equity; no separate non-controlling interest line exists, so this is the best proxy for BE per rules.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest line exists; per rules, Total equity is used for BE and MIB is set to 0.
No balance sheet line for non-controlling interests/minority interest is present; MIB treated as 0 per instructions.
